diagrams.title: BPSK Signal Constellation
diagrams.description: 2D representation showing two antipodal signal points at (√E, 0) and (-√E, 0)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding antipodal signaling and binary modulation

diagrams.title: QPSK Constellation
diagrams.description: 4 signal points at corners of square, phases 45°, 135°, 225°, 315°
elements: Decision boundaries along I and Q axes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding quadrature signaling and Gray coding

diagrams.title: Orthogonal vs Antipodal Distance
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing distance between signal pairs
elements: Antipodal: signals on opposite ends of line
diagrams.purpose: Comparing signal set geometries and noise immunity

diagrams.title: M-ary Signal Constellation Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows constellation for M=2, 4, 8, 16 to illustrate crowding
diagrams.purpose: Understanding effect of increasing M on signal separation

diagrams.title: Signal Space Projection
diagrams.description: Shows how arbitrary signal is projected onto basis functions
